name: Aamin Simmi Singh
headerTaglineTwo: I'm Aamin Simmi Singh – Curious Learner and Software Developer.
headerSubheading: Passionate about AI, Full-Stack Development, Data Science, and building impactful software solutions that solve real-world problems.
headerIntro: I am a B.Tech student specializing in Internet of Things and Blockchain, with experience in AI-powered applications, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), data-driven systems, and modern web technologies.

projects.title: RAG Chatbot
projects.description: An AI-powered Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that combines document retrieval with advanced language models to deliver accurate, context-aware, and factually grounded responses.
projects.fullDescription: An AI-powered Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that combines document retrieval with advanced language models to deliver accurate, context-aware, and factually grounded responses. Built with LangChain and Gemini API, featuring session-aware conversations and secure API configuration.

projects.title: LexAI (Simply Legal)
projects.description: An AI-powered legal document automation platform that simplifies contracts, agreements, and compliance by translating complex legal language into plain English and automating document creation.
projects.fullDescription: An AI-powered legal document automation platform that simplifies contracts, agreements, and compliance by translating complex legal language into plain English and automating document creation. Features Smart Intake Wizard, Dynamic Contract Generation, and RAG-powered clause retrieval.

projects.title: PRAMAAN – AI Powered Forensic Accountant
projects.description: PRAMAAN is an autonomous AI forensic accountant that analyzes financial statements, auditor reports, cash flow statements, and corporate filings to uncover hidden risks, misleading claims, and financial inconsistencies.
projects.fullDescription: PRAMAAN is an autonomous AI forensic accountant that analyzes financial statements, auditor reports, cash flow statements, and corporate filings to uncover hidden risks, misleading claims, and financial inconsistencies. Features custom fine-tuned AI models and jargon-free reporting.

projects.title: VisionMeter
projects.description: A browser-based eye screening platform that enables users to perform visual acuity, color vision, astigmatism, contrast sensitivity, and visual field tests using calibration-driven measurements.
projects.fullDescription: A browser-based eye screening platform that enables users to perform visual acuity, color vision, astigmatism, contrast sensitivity, and visual field tests using calibration-driven measurements. Features voice recognition and PDF report generation.

services.title: AI & ML Solutions
services.description: Building intelligent AI-powered applications using RAG, LLMs, and advanced machine learning techniques.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: End-to-end web application development with modern frameworks like Next.js, React, and FastAPI.

services.title: Data Science
services.description: Data-driven insights and analytics using Python, machine learning models, and visualization tools.

services.title: IoT & Blockchain
services.description: Designing connected systems and decentralized applications for the future of technology.

aboutpara: Frontend Strategist, AI/ML Enthusiast, and Tech Lead specializing in building scalable web applications, IoT, and Blockchain solutions. I am an avid learner with a proven ability to master new technologies, from advanced cloud infrastructure and Generative AI (Google Cloud, IBM) to complex Full-Stack development (MERN, Next.js). A recognized competitor at national-level hackathons (ISRO, TechKriti), I combine rigorous technical problem-solving with a passion for continuous, hands-on innovation.

resume.tagline: 👋 I'm a software engineer and AI enthusiast.
resume.description: I build AI-powered applications and scalable web solutions. Well-versed with Python, React, Next.js, and modern AI/ML frameworks.

experiences.bullets: Building AI-powered applications, Competing in national hackathons, Developing full-stack web solutions

education.universityPara: B.Tech specializing in Internet of Things and Blockchain with focus on AI/ML applications and full-stack development.
